metadata.description: Working data status tracker. Tracks data availability, processing status, and completeness for each area.

statuses.url_identified: Raw data URL(s) found but not yet scraped/converted
statuses.in_progress: Data is being scraped, converted, or validated
statuses.draft: GeoJSON exists in working-data but not yet validated
statuses.complete: Validated GeoJSON in data/ directory, ready for MCP
statuses.no_source: No known public shelter data source for this area
